text:
on the respondent personally—


[ F5 (1A) An application must not be served personally by the applicant himself or herself. ]


(2) Where the applicant is acting in person, the applicant may request the court officer to serve the application on the respondent.


(3) In an application for an occupation order under section 33, 35 or 36 of the 1996 Act M1 , the applicant must serve on the mortgagee and any landlord of the dwelling-house in question—


(4) The applicant must file a certificate of service after serving the application.


( F6 ... )


Textual Amendments


F3 Words in rule 10.3(1) inserted (1.10.2021) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 2) Rules 2021 (S.I. 2021/875) , rules 1 , 7(a)


F4 Words in rule 10.3(1) inserted (13.1.2025) by The Family Procedure (Amendment) Rules 2024 (S.I. 2024/1016) , rules 1(3)(b) , 6(1)


F5 Rule 10.3(1A) inserted (6.4.2017) by The Family Procedure (Amendment) Rules 2017 (S.I. 2017/413) , rules 1 , 3(1)


F6 Words in rule 10.3 omitted (1.10.2021) by virtue of The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 2) Rules 2021 (S.I. 2021/875) , rules 1 , 7(b)
